# Hello Coaches

Your team's medical release waivers are ready. Find your folder here:

[Google Drive — NCLL Medical Waivers 2026](https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1vFAMb0j2eTDhBD3tgsly2MCoiS1ja20g?usp=sharing)

Inside your team folder you'll find:

- **One PDF named after your team** — this is the full team waiver file. Print it, fold and seal it in a Ziplock bag, put that bag inside a second Ziplock bag, and drop it in your ball bucket under the balls. Point it out to your staff so everyone knows where it is.

- **A `share` folder** — this contains individually named blank forms for players whose submissions couldn't be used (digital signature issue, too blurry, incomplete, or wrong form). You can share a link to this folder or send the individual files directly to the families whose names appear in the filenames. Ask them to print, fill out by hand, and return it to you at the first practice. Add each one to the bag when you receive it.

Thanks!

John Shikella
Registrar
